entity.summary: Neo ecosystem decentralized exchange and DeFi platform centered on AMM token swaps, liquidity pools, liquidity provision, and related trading and staking services.
entity.notes: Current first-party Flamingo N3 frontend is reachable. The official Flamingo Finance GitHub organization publishes the Flamingo Swap AMM contract implementation and documents token-pair trading and liquidity provision. Confidence is medium because the current frontend is JavaScript-only and this initial record uses current registry corroboration for status depth.

evidence.title: Flamingo Finance application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Flamingo N3 frontend endpoint is reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Flamingo Swap contract repository
evidence.notes: Official Flamingo Finance organization repository identifies Flamingo Swap as the protocol's on-chain automated market maker and documents constant-product token-pair trading and liquidity provision to swap pools.

evidence.title: Flamingo Finance DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: June 2026 DEX candidate corpus source identifies Flamingo Finance in the DEX category on Neo, providing current registry corroboration alongside first-party application and AMM implementation evidence.
